'''L9-G8''' ('''Elnine-Geeate''') was a [[Cooking droid/Legends|cooking droid]] that was given by the [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] [[King/Legends|King]] [[Ebareebaveebeedee]] to the crew of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] shuttle ''[[Bonderium]]'' during their mission to intercept intelligence [[Datacard/Legends|datapacks]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] transport [[Elusive (transport)|''Elusive'']]. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was 1.8 meters tall and humanoid with a wide, flat, boxy head. Non-stick surfaces and a variety of cooking implements suited his role as a chef.

The Squibs had originally purchased Elnine for fifty [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and kept him for a year. Earlier in his career, he had cooked for the [[Prince of Tamboon]]. Elnine aided ''Bonderium''{{'s}} mission into the [[Paradise system/Legends|Paradise system]] by giving detailed advice for a feast that the crew prepared, in order to bribe entry to the [[Ugor/Legends|Ugor]] holy system.

L9-G8 was capable of cooking delicacies for many species, including:
*[[Dantooine flapjack]]s
*[[Dricklefruit pie ala mode|Dricklefruit pie]]
*[[Free-floating fungal fondu]]
*[[Glazed glucose pate]]
*[[Mitochondria crunchy surprise]]
*[[Photo-lipids in brazened fatty-acid sauce]]
*[[Single-celery soda]]
*[[Spirogyra gelatin]]
*[[Tauntaun chowder]]
*[[Ugorian spore-gruel]]

==Appearances==
*[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']] {{1st}}
